title: Fix 4xx errors blocking page indexation in Google Search Console

requirements.text: Audit the frontend routing and all internal links to ensure no broken or missing routes (404s) exist. All navigation links, CTA buttons, and anchor scroll targets must resolve correctly without producing 4xx responses.

quotes: Bloquée en raison d'un autre problème de type 4xx

acceptanceCriteria: No navigation link or CTA button leads to a missing or unresolvable URL.
All smooth-scroll anchor targets (e.g., #contact, #services) exist in the DOM.
Loading any page of the app returns a 2xx status code, not a 4xx.

requirements.text: Ensure the sitemap.xml and robots.txt only reference valid, reachable URLs. The sitemap must not list any URL that returns a 4xx response. The robots.txt must not accidentally disallow crawlers from key pages.

quotes: Bloquée en raison d'un autre problème de type 4xx

acceptanceCriteria: All URLs listed in frontend/public/sitemap.xml return 2xx responses.
frontend/public/robots.txt does not disallow any URL that should be indexed.
The sitemap URL referenced in robots.txt is correct and reachable.

requirements.text: Verify the Google Search Console verification file (google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html) is publicly accessible at the root of the deployed site without authentication or redirect, so that the verification request does not return a 4xx.

quotes: Bloquée en raison d'un autre problème de type 4xx

acceptanceCriteria: GET /google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html returns 200 with the correct verification content.
No redirect or authentication challenge intercepts this URL.

requirements.text: Ensure the canonical URL declared in the Open Graph tags, Twitter Card meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, and the <link rel='canonical'> tag in frontend/index.html all match the actual production domain exactly (no trailing slash mismatch, no http vs https mismatch) to prevent Google from flagging them as 4xx alternate URLs.

quotes: Bloquée en raison d'un autre problème de type 4xx

acceptanceCriteria: The canonical URL in <link rel='canonical'>, og:url, and JSON-LD all use the same consistent production domain with https.
The sitemap lastmod date is current (2025-07-28 or later).
No meta tag references a URL that would resolve to a 4xx.

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not alter the Google Search Console verification file content (google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html).
Preserve all existing SEO meta tags, structured data, and brand content.
nonGoals: Adding new pages or sections to the website.
Changing the visual design or branding.
Modifying backend Motoko logic beyond what is needed to serve valid responses.
Submitting sitemaps or requesting re-indexation directly in Google Search Console (must be done manually by the user).
